75.reason: // The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes issues when the actual input contains -1 or when the tree logic assumes real values from the start. More critically, if m == 0 (no nodes to insert), the program still prints the placeholder node as a leaf.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  // The root is initialized with -1 as a placeholder, but this causes issues when the actual input contains -1 or when the tree logic assumes real values from the start. More critically, if m == 0 (no nodes to insert), the program still prints the placeholder node as a leaf.

82.reason: // If no elements are inserted (m=0), this will print the dummy root node (-1) as a leaf, which is incorrect. Also, the height of the root should be 1, but the dummy initialization breaks height calculation for the first real node.
